BALANCE_usage: Sent as payment_type='BALANCE' to API when Manual transaction type is selected. Not visible as a user-selectable radio button.
note: The Payments tab UI shows 5 hardcoded payment method options (Credit Card, Cash, Debit Card, Cheque, Interac). Neither ACCOUNT nor BALANCE appears as a user-visible option. BALANCE is wired into the frontend code for manual entries only. ACCOUNT is completely absent from the frontend bundle. This is likely by design — INV-622 is a DB-layer ticket; INV-605 (Reservation Details - Payment Tab - API Integration) handles the UI integration of new payment types.
